data.name: The Saint Wife's Newlywed Trials
data.detailed_description:
Dirk, the hero who saved the world, was granted the title of crown prince for defeating the Demon Lord. He was accompanied on his journey by Marianne, a priestess from the countryside. However, the future emperor isn't permitted to marry a commoner, so their fairy-tale ending was never meant to be. Nonetheless, unwilling to give up on Marianne, Dirk asks her to run away with him. Dirk abandons his status to marry Marianne, and they settle down together in a rural village. The two believe they can spend their days in modest peace, the chaos of the past a distant memory, but village life comes with its own struggles. Will the two be able to overcome these hardships and find true happiness?

Play as both Dirk and Marianne. As Dirk, head to the Adventurers' Guild and complete requests to rank up. Fend off monsters in turn-based RPG combat and explore dungeons to obtain items and earn the money you need to get by. As Marianne, grow crops and help out the other villagers. Develop the village by interacting with your new neighbors and assisting them with their problems.

Guild Requests

Complete requests for the local guild to rank up and unlock terrifying new dungeons and greater rewards!

Traditional RPG Combat

Manage your skills carefully to vanquish monsters and topple powerful bosses in familiar turn-based combat!

Casino

Bet it all at the casino and watch your winnings pile up in the exciting poker minigame!

He was accompanied on his journey by Marianne, a priestess from the countryside. However, the future emperor isn't permitted to marry a commoner, so their fairy-tale ending was never meant to be.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
